topics.title: Getting Started
topics.body: Welcome to Canon Engine! Create a character, choose a name and archetype, then begin your adventure. Type `/look` to see your surroundings, `/inv` to check your inventory, and `/help` for a full command list. Your choices shape the story — there are no wrong paths, only consequences.

topics.title: Action Bar
topics.body: The action bar at the bottom of the screen shows suggested actions you can take. These chips are context-sensitive — they change based on your location, current quest, and recent events. Tap a chip to execute the action instantly, or type your own command.

topics.title: Slash Commands
topics.body:
Slash commands are quick actions prefixed with `/`. Common commands:
• `/look` — Examine your surroundings
• `/inv` — Open inventory
• `/attack` — Engage in combat
• `/say <text>` — Speak in character
• `/do <action>` — Perform a custom action
• `/travel <destination>` — Move to a new location
• `/think <thought>` — Internal monologue
• `/talk <npc>` — Speak with an NPC
• `/scout` — Survey the area for threats or secrets
• `/stealth` — Attempt to move unseen
• `/shop` — Browse merchant wares
• `/save` — Save your game
• `/help` — Show all commands

topics.title: Inventory
topics.body: Your inventory holds items you've collected — weapons, armor, potions, quest items, and loot. Use `/inv` to view it. Equip items with `/equip <item>`. Some items are consumable and will be used immediately. Weight and capacity limits may apply depending on your STR stat.

topics.title: Character Stats
topics.body:
Your character has six core stats:
• **STR** (Strength) — Melee damage, carrying capacity
• **DEX** (Dexterity) — Initiative, AC, ranged attacks, lockpicking
• **INT** (Intelligence) — Magic power, skill checks
• **CHA** (Charisma) — NPC reactions, bartering, leadership
• **CON** (Constitution) — Max HP, poison resistance
• **LCK** (Luck) — Scavenging, critical hits, random events

Modifiers follow D&D 5e rules: modifier = (stat - 10) / 2, rounded down.

topics.title: Equipment
topics.body: Equipment slots: weapon, shield, helmet, armor, boots, gloves, ring, amulet. Use `/equip <item>` to equip and `/unequip <slot>` to remove. Equipped items grant stat bonuses, AC, and special effects. Some items have level or stat requirements.

topics.title: Combat HUD
topics.body:
During combat, the HUD shows:
• Round number and initiative order
• Enemy list with HP bars
• Your HP/MP/STM bars
• Moves remaining this turn
• Status effects (poison, stun, guard, etc.)

Actions: `/attack`, `/block`, `/item <name>`, `/flee`. Defeating enemies grants XP, gold, and loot.

topics.title: Tutorial System
topics.body: New players are guided through an interactive tutorial covering movement, inventory, combat, skills, quests, saving, NPC interaction, and crafting. The tutorial uses suggestion chips to guide you. Type `/tutorial` to restart or `/tutorial exit` to skip.

topics.title: Settings
topics.body:
Adjust your experience:
• Difficulty: easy, normal, hard, nightmare
• Narrator verbosity: terse, normal, verbose
• Theme: dark, light, parchment
• Auto-save: on/off

Use `/settings` to view and `/settings <key> <value>` to change.

topics.title: Saving & Loading
topics.body: Your game is stored in save slots. Use `/save [slot]` to save and `/load [slot]` to restore. Auto-save triggers on major events (combat end, quest completion, level up). Each slot stores the full world state, inventory, quests, and narrative history.

topics.title: About Canon Engine
topics.body: Canon Engine is a tabletop RPG engine powered by AI narration. It combines D&D-inspired mechanics with dynamic storytelling. The engine features procedural world generation, NPC AI, faction systems, crafting, skill trees, boss encounters, and a living world that remembers your choices. Built with love by Nous Research.
